name: Third-Person Adventure Slice
agentBrief: A complete third-person open-world adventure slice (Godot 4.6, 3D, GDScript). ENTRY SCENE: res://scenes/main.tscn. Unlike the previously published zip of this template, this version SHIPS project.godot with the full input map already bound: move_forward W, move_back S, move_left A, move_right D, jump Space, sprint Shift, interact E, plus camera_left/camera_right/camera_up/camera_down declared as actions (the camera is mouse-driven, but scripts reference those action names and Godot errors on undeclared actions — do not delete them). PLAYER: scripts/third_person_controller.gd (CharacterBody3D: move, sprint, jump) + scripts/third_person_camera.gd (mouse-orbit camera) + scripts/humanoid_locomotion_animator.gd driving the rigged robot character in assets/third_person_adventure/characters/player_robot/; input is read through scripts/adventure_input_reader.gd. WORLD: terrain built by scripts/adventure_terrain_generator.gd + adventure_terrain_grid.gd with terrain_flat_pad.gd and terrain_road_path.gd; environment props placed by adventure_environment_prop_setup.gd and materials applied by adventure_model_material_applier.gd. GAMEPLAY SYSTEMS: interactables (adventure_interactable.gd), collectibles (adventure_collectible.gd), inventory (adventure_inventory.gd), quest state (adventure_quest_state.gd), patrolling NPCs (adventure_patrol_npc.gd), HUD (adventure_hud.gd). Physics layers are defined in scripts/adventure_layers.gd. tools/ holds dev-only inspect_* and verify_* scripts — not game runtime; do not wire them into scenes. No .godot cache ships, so the first editor scan re-imports the FBX and texture assets (takes minutes; it is not a hang). Use only assets under res://assets/third_person_adventure/ — the inventory is asset_manifest/third_person_adventure_assets.md. CUSTOMIZE BY: swapping the player model, retuning controller and camera @exports, editing scenes/main.tscn, and adding interactables, collectibles and quests on the existing systems — do not rewrite the controller/camera/animator spine.

userFacing.tagline: A complete third-person adventure slice: animated robot hero, orbit camera, quests and collectibles.
highlights: Third-person controller with sprint, jump and smooth orbit camera
Fully rigged and animated robot player character
Generated terrain with roads, pads and placed environment props
Interactables, collectibles, inventory and quest state systems
Patrolling NPCs and a ready HUD
Input map ships bound and ready — open the project and play
